_doc: Audience stakes classification. Maps audience names to stakes buckets. Used by ContextProfiler Layer 2. Audience strings are prefixed with '→' to distinguish them from role names (think: presenting TO this audience). Stakes buckets are classification tags only — they carry no direct weights. All stakes-based lift now lives in mindset-vectors.json (base table, role|stakes) and mindset-overrides.json (sparse role|audience exceptions).
_note_unknown: Audience strings not matching any bucket (including blank/null) fall through to stakes-unknown. No direct weight lift. L1 lookup falls back to 'role|internal' as the safest default.
_note_aliases: Legacy audience strings supported via simulator alias table so older saved sessions still classify: 'Leadership team' → '→ Exec team'; 'Cross-functional team' → '→ XFN stakeholders'.
